  "title": "CCTV Operator",
  "description": "Artee Group - The story of SPAR can&#39;t be told without mentioning Artee Group. Over the past 30 years, Artee Industries Limited has grown from very humble beginnings to become one of the fastest growing business conglomerates in Nigeria. The story started in 1988, with the opening of a small supermarket store measuring 120 m2 in Lagos under the Park &rsquo;n&rsquo; Shop banner. Today, its business spreads from retail to real estate, shopping malls and manufacturing, rightly gaining popularity as Artee Group.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: CCTV Operator&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	A CCTV Operator is responsible for monitoring surveillance cameras and ensuring the safety and security of a designated area or facility.&nbsp;
	Continuously monitor multiple CCTV cameras and video feeds in real-time.
	Identify and assess any unauthorized or suspicious activities, intrusions, or safety concerns
	Maintain situational awareness and respond promptly to potential security breaches
	Notify appropriate personnel, such as security officers, law enforcement, or emergency services, in case of suspicious or criminal activities.
	Follow established protocols and procedures for responding to various types of incidents, including emergencies, thefts, or safety hazards.
	Record and document all observed incidents, activities, and actions taken during the monitoring shift.
	Maintain accurate and detailed logs, including time, date and descriptions of events.
	Review previous night footage, report findings immediately to the store CSO and record the same details of incident for reference purposes.
	Communicate effectively with store CSO, Store&nbsp;Manager, security personnel, supervisors, and other team members using radio, phone, or other communication devices.
	Provide clear and concise information about ongoing incidents and observations.
	Ensure the proper functioning of CCTV equipment, including cameras, monitors, recording devices, and software applications.
	Report any technical issues or malfunctions to the Store CSO and Store Manager and further report to the IT department for timely resolution.
	Register all technical faults on the CCTV system on the log book.
	Collaborate with other security personnel and operations departments to enhance overall safety, security measures and response strategies.
	Adhere to company privacy policies, guidelines, and legal regulations related to surveillance.
	Handle sensitive and confidential information in a responsible manner.


Skill set / Competencies:


	Strong supervisory and Communication skill
	Strong observation skill
	Customer Service Focus to ensure positive shopping experiences
	Ability to work under pressure
	Should be able to maintain good inter-personal relationship with co-employees and others
	Strong attentive to details, a creative thinker and a good team player
	Able to multi-task, and manage time effectively
	Demonstrate ability to handle confidential and sensitive information
	High level of integrity is a must have.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@arteegroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

CCTV Operator Job at Artee Group




        
    

        
        Artee Group - The story of SPAR can't be told without mentioning Artee Group. Over the past 30 years, Artee Industries Limited has grown from very humble beginnings to become one of the fastest growing business conglomerates in Nigeria. The story started in 1988, with the opening of a small supermarket store measuring 120 m2 in Lagos under the Park ’n’ Shop banner. Today, its business spreads from retail to real estate, shopping malls and manufacturing, rightly gaining popularity as Artee Group.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: CCTV Operator 

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	A CCTV Operator is responsible for monitoring surveillance cameras and ensuring the safety and security of a designated area or facility. 
	Continuously monitor multiple CCTV cameras and video feeds in real-time.
	Identify and assess any unauthorized or suspicious activities, intrusions, or safety concerns
	Maintain situational awareness and respond promptly to potential security breaches
	Notify appropriate personnel, such as security officers, law enforcement, or emergency services, in case of suspicious or criminal activities.
	Follow established protocols and procedures for responding to various types of incidents, including emergencies, thefts, or safety hazards.
	Record and document all observed incidents, activities, and actions taken during the monitoring shift.
	Maintain accurate and detailed logs, including time, date and descriptions of events.
	Review previous night footage, report findings immediately to the store CSO and record the same details of incident for reference purposes.
	Communicate effectively with store CSO, Store Manager, security personnel, supervisors, and other team members using radio, phone, or other communication devices.
	Provide clear and concise information about ongoing incidents and observations.
	Ensure the proper functioning of CCTV equipment, including cameras, monitors, recording devices, and software applications.
	Report any technical issues or malfunctions to the Store CSO and Store Manager and further report to the IT department for timely resolution.
	Register all technical faults on the CCTV system on the log book.
	Collaborate with other security personnel and operations departments to enhance overall safety, security measures and response strategies.
	Adhere to company privacy policies, guidelines, and legal regulations related to surveillance.
	Handle sensitive and confidential information in a responsible manner.


Skill set / Competencies:


	Strong supervisory and Communication skill
	Strong observation skill
	Customer Service Focus to ensure positive shopping experiences
	Ability to work under pressure
	Should be able to maintain good inter-personal relationship with co-employees and others
	Strong attentive to details, a creative thinker and a good team player
	Able to multi-task, and manage time effectively
	Demonstrate ability to handle confidential and sensitive information
	High level of integrity is a must have.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Flex Films
content:
Flex Films is the global film manufacturing arm of India's largest multinational flexible packaging company, UFlex Limited. Operating manufacturing facilities across Asia, Europe, North America, and Africa, they produce a wide range of packaging products, including BOPET, BOPP, CPP, and specialty films used in various industries.

Flex Films maintains a strong localized presence to ensure just-in-time global supply and bespoke technological solutions. In your region, their African operations are highly prominent through their state-of-the-art facility

We are  recruiting to fill the following positions below: 

1.) Mechanical Fitter
     

            
    



Job Location: Sagamu, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Attending to the routine problems
	Maintaining of spares assemblies ready
	Coordination with section in-charge and giving feedback on the daily activities and problems
	Attending daily meetings
	Ensure downtime reduction
	Undertake why- why analysis during the occurrence of downtime
	Promoting a culture of quality, Environment, health, safety, and other applicable management system’s requirement.
	Developing, implementing, and maintaining the IMS.
	Ensuring compliance with relevant standards and regulations.
	Conducting audits and assessments to evaluate the effectiveness of the IMS.
	Training employees on the IMS and its requirements.
	Continually Pursues new development to improve Plant Safety/ Environment.


Application Closing Date: 20th July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the  Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Personal Assistant (P.A) to the  Managing Director (Female)

Job Location: Victoria Isaland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Oversee the day to day activities of the MD by arranging for:
	
		Tea
		Coffee
		Lunch.
		Refreshment for the MD and his guests.
	
	
	Ensuring the MD’s office is clean and tidy.
	Sending Goggle / Zoom invites as per requirement.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 8 years of experience.
	Have a basic computer knowledge.
	Pleasing Personality.
	Have knowledge on Microsoft word and Excel.
	Good IQ and communication
	Good command of English
	Good character, attitude and energetic.


Application Closing Date: 30th July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CVs and pictures to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email. 

Note: We need strictly your CV and picture, application letter is not compulsory.

 

3.) Export Executive

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Timely preparation of error free exports documents for both sea and air shipments and their submission to Excise, Accounts and Marketing department
	Preparation of applications for availing Reward/Incentive Schemes from DGFT such as Focus Market Scheme and Focus Product Scheme and carrying out their registration process at various Custom ports.
	Online filing and preparation of applications for obtaining certificates such as Trading House Certificate, Importer Exporter Code, Registration Cum Membership Certificate from The Plastics Export Promotion Council and Certificate of Membership from Delhi Chamber of Commerce
	Maintain and update database of exports shipment, licenses, EPCG obligations done and pending.
	Able to provide the accurate and appropriate documentation for international trade and freight.
	Ensure timely availing of all after export benefits.
	Ensure timely fulfillment of all export obligations.
	Effective cost reduction for the services hired.
	Liaison and visit to banks, ministry, customs department and DGFT.
	Knowledge of Foreign trade policy and various trade agreement procedures (Export)


Salary
N200,000 / Month.

Application Closing Date: 30th July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail. 

     

    

        Click here to Apply

Content Creator Job at Roxbury Leisure Homes




        
    

        
        Roxbury Leisure Homes is a real estate company that majors in constructing affordable housing for the average income earning families in Lagos Nigeria. We engage in constructingaffordable housing that will meet the needs of a wide range of clients. We are working towards becoming one of the largest affordable housing construction companies in Lagos and Nigeria with an active presence in major cities in Nigeria. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: VGC, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	We are looking for a creative and results-driven Content Creator to join our team.


Key Responsibilities


	Create engaging photo, video, and graphic content for the company's social media platforms.
	Develop and execute a content calendar.
	Grow the company's online presence through consistent posting and audience engagement.
	Generate quality leads through digital content and social media campaigns.
	Monitor content performance and provide regular reports.
	Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to support business objectives.


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Content Creator.
	Strong skills in creating engaging content for social media platforms.
	Ability to keep the company's social media pages active with consistent, high-quality content.
	Experience in developing content that drives engagement and generates leads.
	Good knowledge of social media trends, content planning, and basic video/photo editing.
	Excellent communication and writing skills.
	Must reside in Ikota, Ajah, or nearby areas.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineer - RF Optimization",
  "description": "MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineer - RF Optimization

Job Identification: 7411
Job Location: Kano
Job Type: Full Time
Reports To:&nbsp;&nbsp;Manager - Radio Frequency Optimization Kano
Division: Network

Mission


	To manage radio network design and optimization activities in the Kano Region of the network comprising (Kano, Gigawa ,Katsina, Kebbi, Sokoto, Gombe,Yobe, Borno and Zamfara), ensuring that enough capacity and coverage is provided to support subscriber growth and usage demands. To provide high Quality of Service (QoS) to MTN subscribers from a radio access point of view.


Description


	Network optimization functions within the region which will be measured by:
	
		Capacity assurance &ndash; Liaise with the Planning and implementation team to ensure that at any time the network will be able to accommodate the subscriber level anticipated 3 months ahead
		SLA KPIs improvement &ndash; Ensure that the optimization vendors execute optimization actions to continually improve the SLA KPIs
		Technology integration &ndash; Liaise with the Planning team to ensure that multiservice sites (2G, 3G, 4G, 5G etc) are properly designed and integrated with minimal complexity and good Inter Radio Access Technology performance.
		Time - Ensuring that network optimization and SLA KPIs improvement are done in timely manner.
	
	
	Always maintain a detailed knowledge of the coverage areas of all the RAN nodes in the regions, profile their performance and report status
	Monitor, benchmark and report all competitor activities
	Manage customer complaints handling with the optimization vendor.
	Apply the use of optimization tools to conduct routine deep dive to identify network problems and resolve them.
	Be aware of any of the issues below that may affect the successful operation of MTN&rsquo;s business within the region
	Provide specialist technical support to all other departments regarding the network and radio related features
	Conduct the trialing and deployment of new features on the network
	Conduct routine coverage evaluation using physical drive tests and virtual drive tests.
	Conduct daily, weekly and monthly analysis and audit of the network, resolve identified issues through the optimization vendors and escalate the ones meant for other stakeholders.
	Monitor and analyze network performance and configuration to ensure KPIs are in conformance with targets for the region
	Continuously analyze traffic, utilization and subscriber growth in order to foresee needs for capacity expansion.
	Review, prepare and load cell data for rehoming sites.
	Evaluate, verify and supervise the optimization of MTNN radio networks by managed service vendor(s)


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Electrical / Electronics or Telecommunications Engineering or related discipline
	Fluent in English&nbsp;


Experience:


	3 &ndash; 7 years of experience in an area of specialization; with experience working with others
	Cognate RF Optimization, Analysis and solutions experience&nbsp;
	Experience with a GSM, WCDMA, LTE or Wireless Telecomm operator
	Experience working in a multi-vendor network
	Experience with Ericsson, Huawei and ZTE equipment will be desirable
",

Engineer - RF Optimization Job at MTN Nigeria




        
    

        
        MTN Nigeria - The leader in telecommunications in Nigeria, and a part of a diverse community in Africa and the Middle East, our brand is instantly recognisable. It is through our compelling brand that we are able to attract the right talents who we carefully nurture by continuously improving our employment offerings even beyond reward and recognition. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:  Engineer - RF Optimization

Job Identification: 7411
Job Location: Kano
Job Type: Full Time
Reports To:  Manager - Radio Frequency Optimization Kano
Division: Network

Mission
     

            
    




	To manage radio network design and optimization activities in the Kano Region of the network comprising (Kano, Gigawa ,Katsina, Kebbi, Sokoto, Gombe,Yobe, Borno and Zamfara), ensuring that enough capacity and coverage is provided to support subscriber growth and usage demands. To provide high Quality of Service (QoS) to MTN subscribers from a radio access point of view.


Description


	Network optimization functions within the region which will be measured by:
	
		Capacity assurance – Liaise with the Planning and implementation team to ensure that at any time the network will be able to accommodate the subscriber level anticipated 3 months ahead
		SLA KPIs improvement – Ensure that the optimization vendors execute optimization actions to continually improve the SLA KPIs
		Technology integration – Liaise with the Planning team to ensure that multiservice sites (2G, 3G, 4G, 5G etc) are properly designed and integrated with minimal complexity and good Inter Radio Access Technology performance.
		Time - Ensuring that network optimization and SLA KPIs improvement are done in timely manner.
	
	
	Always maintain a detailed knowledge of the coverage areas of all the RAN nodes in the regions, profile their performance and report status
	Monitor, benchmark and report all competitor activities
	Manage customer complaints handling with the optimization vendor.
	Apply the use of optimization tools to conduct routine deep dive to identify network problems and resolve them.
	Be aware of any of the issues below that may affect the successful operation of MTN’s business within the region
	Provide specialist technical support to all other departments regarding the network and radio related features
	Conduct the trialing and deployment of new features on the network
	Conduct routine coverage evaluation using physical drive tests and virtual drive tests.
	Conduct daily, weekly and monthly analysis and audit of the network, resolve identified issues through the optimization vendors and escalate the ones meant for other stakeholders.
	Monitor and analyze network performance and configuration to ensure KPIs are in conformance with targets for the region
	Continuously analyze traffic, utilization and subscriber growth in order to foresee needs for capacity expansion.
	Review, prepare and load cell data for rehoming sites.
	Evaluate, verify and supervise the optimization of MTNN radio networks by managed service vendor(s)


Requirements
Education:


	First Degree in Electrical / Electronics or Telecommunications Engineering or related discipline
	Fluent in English 


Experience:


	3 – 7 years of experience in an area of specialization; with experience working with others
	Cognate RF Optimization, Analysis and solutions experience 
	Experience with a GSM, WCDMA, LTE or Wireless Telecomm operator
	Experience working in a multi-vendor network
	Experience with Ericsson, Huawei and ZTE equipment will be desirable
    

    

        Click here to Apply
